title: Sideroxylon montanum
taxonomy: Sideroxylon montanum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is a member of the genus Sideroxylon, which consists of several species of trees and shrubs. The Sapotaceae family is a group of plants commonly known as sapotes or soapberries. Sideroxylon montanum is native to the Americas, specifically in the mountainous regions of Central and South America. Further classification of Sideroxylon montanum may include its species rank and other taxonomic details.
